name: Teriyaki Turf and Surf Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless tender beef steak (about 1 inch thick)
3/4 lb Large shrimp peeled and deveined
4 Green onion cut crosswise into 2-inch lengths
4 Metal or wooden skewers, each about 12 inches long
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beef and shrimp in a large plastic bag.
2. Combine teriyaki sauce, minced green onions, sherry, and ginger in the bag.
3. Press air out of the bag and tie the top securely.
4. Marinate for 30 minutes, occasionally turning the bag.
5. Thread beef, prawns, and green onion lengths alternately onto skewers, leaving space between pieces.
6. Place skewers on a grill 4-5 inches from hot coals.
7. Cook for 4 minutes, then turn skewers over and cook an additional 3 minutes, or until the shrimp are cooked through.
